categories.description: Read app metadata, locale, and preferred language information.
Read component context, settings, state, runtime information, and grant state.
Read host process and WebView memory, CPU, uptime, and version information.
Read operating system, architecture, environment, network, disk, and memory information.
Read display, cursor, and coordinate conversion information.
Read theme, high contrast, reduced motion, and system color information.
Read battery, idle, and display power state information.
Open approved external URLs, package files, configured files, or reveal package items.
Open file pickers, save pickers, and message boxes.
Read and write clipboard text and HTML.
Read, write, remove, and clear component-private storage.
Read, write, inspect, and release user-granted file tokens.
Request public HTTPS data through the host fetch policy.
